## Summary

Describe the problem, the solution, and why the change belongs in Termfolio.

## Related issue

Link the issue or explain why one is not needed.

## User impact and compatibility

Describe visible behaviour, configuration changes, compatibility effects, migration needs, and any accessibility, privacy, or performance impact.

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `bash scripts/test-theme.sh`.
- [ ] Ran `npm ci` and `npm run check`.
- [ ] Ran `shellcheck scripts/*.sh` when shell scripts changed.
- [ ] Ran `bash scripts/test-release-validator.sh` when release automation changed.
- [ ] Ran `git diff --check`.
- [ ] Added or updated example content and assertions where behaviour changed.
- [ ] Updated user-facing documentation where a public contract changed.

List any check that was not applicable or could not run, with the reason.

## Screenshots

Add before-and-after screenshots for visual changes, or state that the section is not applicable.

## Release considerations

Identify changelog, release-note, compatibility, or follow-up work a maintainer should consider. Do not change versions, tags, or release artifacts unless this pull request is explicitly preparing an approved release.
